# Veryfazty - Delivery App Ecosystem

> Veryfazty es una web app que brinda una gran experiencia de uso a los clientes, ofreciéndoles los mejores restaurantes a zona de reparto de todo Vichayito y Las Pocitas. 

## About Veryfazty
Veryfazty is a premium, elegant, and fast food delivery application serving the beach areas of northern Peru. Our core philosophy is represented by the simplicity and elegance of white space that houses a small universe of restaurants. We aim to foster competition, good service, and the agility to organize orders so they are delivered as quickly as possible—and above all, hot. 

Our mission is to automatically and systematically offer smart food recommendations based on customer tastes and preferences.

## Service Area
- Vichayito
- Las Pocitas
- Los Órganos
- Máncora

## Key Features
- **Fast Delivery:** Prioritizes hot, fresh food delivered in record time.
- **Smart Recommendations:** Provides personalized restaurant recommendations based on AI and customer preferences.
- **Premium UX/UI:** Uses a distinct "White and Light Blue" aesthetic that emphasizes elegance and ease of use.

## Partner Restaurants & Availability 
Some of our top affiliated restaurants on the platform include, but are not limited to:
- **La Rinconada:** Premium meats, imported cuts, Wagyu, Angus, Duroc pork. 
- **Restobar Suylu:** Seafood, Ceviche, grilled chicken (Pollo a la brasa), desserts.
- **La K:** Pizzas, Burgers, Pastas, Sandwiches, Ceviche.
- **Playa Palmeras:** Seafood, Ceviche, Desserts, Salads.
- **Las Cabañas de Antica:** Pizzas, pastas, grilled meats, seafood.

## Contact Information
- **Phone / WhatsApp Delivery:** +51 924 380 097
- **Main Website:** https://veryfazty.com
